description: Keycloak Authorization header Bearer token extraction does not validate per RFC 6750, allowing non-standard whitespace and malformed tokens
rfc_violations: No strict enforcement of single ASCII space separator
Non-standard whitespace characters not rejected (tabs, zero-width spaces)
Token value not validated against b64token production rule
attack_vectors: Whitespace smuggling: non-ASCII space characters between Bearer and token
Token injection: characters outside the b64token charset accepted
Case manipulation: inconsistent Bearer scheme matching
remediation: Case-insensitive validation of the Bearer scheme
Strict enforcement of a single ASCII space separator
Validate token value matches RFC 6750 b64token production rule
